steps.title: Recognize the cause-and-effect link
steps.content: The researchers found a method to widen grooves. The next sentence describes what happens once these grooves are widened — they become wide enough that conductors can pass through. This is a direct consequence of the widening process.

steps.title: Apply the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: “As a result” directly expresses this cause-and-effect relationship. Previously suggests something happened earlier, in contrast suggests disagreement, and for example presents an illustration. That matches Choice D — As a result,.
